title: Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed — Chapter 855
main_description: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 138 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
key_events: Brook Steals the Road Poneglyph Copy
Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
